questions.question: She ____ tea every morning.
questions.explanation: Third person singular (she/he/it) এর সাথে verb এর শেষে s বসে। 'drink' → 'drinks'। 'every morning' ঘুরে ঘুরে হওয়া কাজ বোঝায় যা Present Indefinite এর চিহ্ন।

questions.question: They ____ football on weekends.
questions.explanation: 'They' plural subject, তাই base verb 'play' বসে — কোনো s যায় না। Plural subject এবং third person singular না হলে verb এর আকার অপরিবর্তিত থাকে।

questions.question: My father ____ to the office by bus.
questions.explanation: Third person singular (my father = he) এবং verb 'go' শেষে o আছে, তাই 'es' যুক্ত হয়ে 'goes' হয়। নিয়ম: o, s, x, ch, sh দিয়ে শেষ হলে 'es' বসে।

questions.question: The earth ____ round the sun.
questions.explanation: Universal truth (সার্বজনীন সত্য) সবসময় Present Indefinite এ হয়। 'The earth' third person singular, তাই 'moves'। Universal truth, scientific facts এবং permanent truths এই tense এ ব্যবহৃত হয়।

questions.question: Water ____ at 100 degrees Celsius.
questions.explanation: বৈজ্ঞানিক সত্য (scientific fact) Present Indefinite এ বসে। 'Water' uncountable singular subject, তাই third person singular হিসেবে 'boils'। Scientific facts সবসময় এই tense এ।

questions.question: He ____ in a bank.
questions.explanation: Permanent situation / profession (স্থায়ী অবস্থা বা পেশা) Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়। 'He' third person singular, তাই 'work' → 'works'।

questions.question: I ____ in Dhaka.
questions.explanation: 'I' first person singular, তাই base verb 'live' বসে — কোনো s যায় না। Permanent location বোঝাতে Present Indefinite ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে।

questions.question: The baby ____ all the time.
questions.explanation: Consonant + y দিয়ে শেষ হলে y উঠে ies বসে। 'cry' → 'cries'। 'The baby' third person singular, তাই এই পরিবর্তন হয়। নিয়ম: স্বরবর্ণ (vowel) ছাড়া y হলে ies।

questions.question: She ____ her homework carefully.
questions.explanation: Third person singular এবং verb 'do' শেষে o আছে, তাই 'es' বসে → 'does'। 'do' একটি irregular ধরনের third person change।

questions.question: It ____ a lot in the monsoon.
questions.explanation: 'It' third person singular, তাই 'rain' → 'rains'। ঋতু ও আবহাওয়া সম্পর্কিত ঘটনা Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়।

questions.question: My mother ____ delicious food.
questions.explanation: Habit / routine (অভ্যাস) বোঝাতে Present Indefinite। 'My mother' third person singular, তাই 'cook' → 'cooks'।

questions.question: We ____ English on Mondays.
questions.explanation: 'We' plural first person, তাই base form 'study' বসে — কোনো s বা ies যায় না। মনে রাখো: শুধু third person singular এ y → ies হয়, বাকিদের ক্ষেত্রে base form থাকে।

questions.question: He ____ a new car.
questions.explanation: 'He' third person singular, তাই 'have' → 'has'। 'have' একটি irregular verb যা third person এ 'has' হয়।

questions.question: I ____ two brothers.
questions.explanation: 'I' first person, তাই base form 'have' বসে। 'have' third person এ 'has' হয় কিন্তু অন্য subject এ base form 'have' থাকে।

questions.question: She ____ like spicy food.
questions.explanation: Negative sentence এ third person singular এর আগে 'doesn't' বসে, তারপর base verb। 'She doesn't like' — verb থেকে s চলে যায়। 'don't' শুধু I/you/we/they এর সাথে।

questions.question: They ____ play cricket on Sundays.
questions.explanation: Negative sentence এ plural / non-third-person subject এর আগে 'don't' বসে। 'They don't play'। 'doesn't' শুধু he/she/it এর সাথে।

questions.question: ____ she like music?
questions.explanation: Interrogative (প্রশ্নবোধক) sentence এ third person singular এর আগে 'Does' বসে, তারপর base verb। 'Does she like?'। verb থেকে s চলে যায়।

questions.question: ____ you speak English?
questions.explanation: Interrogative sentence এ I/you/we/they এর আগে 'Do' বসে। 'Do you speak?'। 'Does' শুধু third person singular এর সাথে।

questions.question: The cat ____ milk.
questions.explanation: 'The cat' third person singular (it), তাই 'like' → 'likes'। Habitual action Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়।

questions.question: She ____ her hair every day.
questions.explanation: Verb যদি ch, sh, ss, x, o দিয়ে শেষ হয় তবে 'es' বসে। 'wash' → 'washes' (শেষে sh আছে)। Third person singular নিয়ম।

questions.question: He ____ chess well.
questions.explanation: 'He' third person singular, তাই 'play' → 'plays'। Skill বা ability বোঝাতেও Present Indefinite ব্যবহৃত হয়।

questions.question: The train ____ at 9 am.
questions.explanation: Fixed timetable / schedule (নির্দিষ্ট সময়সূচি) Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়। 'The train' third person singular, তাই 'leaves'।

questions.question: A mango ____ sweet.
questions.explanation: Sensory perception / permanent quality (স্থায়ী গুণ) Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়। 'A mango' third person singular, তাই 'tastes'।

questions.question: He ____ in Allah.
questions.explanation: Belief / permanent state Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়। 'He' third person singular, তাই 'believe' → 'believes'। Stative verb 'believe' সাধারণত Continuous তে বসে না।

questions.question: I ____ understand this question.
questions.explanation: Negative sentence এ 'I' এর সাথে 'don't' বসে। 'I don't understand'। 'doesn't' শুধু third person singular এর সাথে।

questions.question: This book ____ to me.
questions.explanation: State verb (belong, own, possess) Present Indefinite এ ব্যবহৃত হয়। 'This book' third person singular, তাই 'belong' → 'belongs'। Possession ও ownership বোঝাতে এই tense।

questions.question: She ____ a beautiful song.
questions.explanation: 'She' third person singular, তাই 'sing' → 'sings'। Regular habit বা action Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়।

questions.question: They usually ____ to school on foot.
questions.explanation: 'They' plural subject, তাই base form 'go'। Frequency adverb 'usually' subject এর পরে এবং main verb এর আগে বসে: 'They usually go'।

questions.question: He ____ English very well.
questions.explanation: State verb 'know' Present Indefinite এ বসে (Continuous তে নয়)। 'He' third person singular, তাই 'know' → 'knows'।

questions.question: She ____ watching television.
questions.explanation: State verb 'love' (feeling/emotion) Present Indefinite এ বসে। 'She' third person singular, তাই 'love' → 'loves'। Emotion verbs Continuous তে বসে না।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'I go to school every day.'
questions.explanation: 'every day' ঘুরে ঘুরে হওয়া কাজ বোঝায় (habit) এবং base verb 'go' ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে — এটি Present Indefinite। Continuous হলে 'am going' হতো।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'She drinks tea every morning.'
questions.explanation: 'every morning' habitual time expression এবং 'drinks' (third person singular with s) — Present Indefinite। 'is drinking' হলে Continuous হতো।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'The sun rises in the east.'
questions.explanation: Universal truth (সার্বজনীন সত্য) সবসময় Present Indefinite এ হয়। 'rises' (third person singular)। 'The sun rises in the east' একটি eternal fact।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'He works in a hospital.'
questions.explanation: Permanent situation / profession (পেশা) Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়। 'works' (third person singular)। এটি একটি স্থায়ী অবস্থা, সাময়িক নয়।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.'
questions.explanation: Scientific fact Present Indefinite এ হয়। 'boils' (third person singular)। বৈজ্ঞানিক সত্য সবসময় এই tense এ বোঝানো হয়।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'They play football every weekend.'
questions.explanation: 'every weekend' habitual action এবং plural 'play' (base form) — Present Indefinite। 'are playing' হলে Continuous হতো।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'My brother doesn't like coffee.'
questions.explanation: 'doesn't like' — Present Indefinite negative form (does + not + base verb)। Dislike বা preference একটি permanent state।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'Do you speak English?'
questions.explanation: 'Do you speak' — Present Indefinite interrogative (Do + subject + base verb)। Ability বোঝাতেও Present Indefinite ব্যবহৃত হয়।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'The train leaves at 7 pm.'
questions.explanation: Fixed timetable / official schedule (নির্দিষ্ট সময়সূচি) Present Indefinite এ বোঝানো হয়। 'leaves' (third person singular)।

questions.question: Arrange: (every / plays / cricket / day / he)
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (He) + Verb (plays, কারণ third person singular) + Object (cricket) + Time (every day)। 'every day' সাধারণত বাক্যের শেষে বসে।

questions.question: Arrange: (sun / the / in / rises / east / the)
options: The sun rises in the east.
The sun rise in the east.
In the east the sun rising.
questions.correctAnswer: The sun rises in the east.
questions.explanation: Universal truth এর সঠিক কাঠামো: Subject (The sun) + Verb (rises) + Preposition phrase (in the east)। 'The sun' third person singular, তাই 'rises'।

questions.question: Arrange: (tea / she / every / drinks / morning)
questions.explanation: Subject (She) + Verb (drinks) + Object (tea) + Time (every morning)। 'She' third person singular, তাই 'drinks'। Time adverbial সাধারণত শেষে বসে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'He go to office every day.'
options: He goes to office every day.
He going to office every day.
He gone to office every day.
He went to office every day.
questions.correctAnswer: He goes to office every day.
questions.explanation: 'He' third person singular, তাই 'go' এর সাথে 'es' যুক্ত হয়ে 'goes' হবে। 'every day' habitual action যা Present Indefinite এ হয়।

questions.question: Find the error: 'She don't like coffee.'
questions.explanation: Third person singular এর negative এ 'doesn't' বসে, 'don't' নয়। 'She doesn't like' — main verb base form এ থাকে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'They plays football on Sundays.'
options: They are play football on Sundays.
questions.explanation: 'They' plural subject, তাই base verb 'play' বসে — কোনো s যায় না। 'plays' ভুল। Plural subject এর সাথে verb এর আকার অপরিবর্তিত থাকে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'Do she like music?'
questions.explanation: Third person singular interrogative এ 'Does' বসে (Do নয়), এবং main verb base form 'like' এ থাকে (s ছাড়া)। 'Do she like' এবং 'Does she likes' দুটোই ভুল।

questions.question: Find the error: 'The baby cry all the time.'
options: The baby cries all the time.
The baby crys all the time.
The baby crying all the time.
The baby is cry all the time.
questions.correctAnswer: The baby cries all the time.
questions.explanation: 'The baby' third person singular এবং 'cry' শেষে consonant + y, তাই y উঠে 'ies' বসে → 'cries'। 'crys' ভুল বানান।

questions.question: Translate: 'সে প্রতিদিন স্কুলে যায়।'
options: He goes to school every day.
He is going to school every day.
He went to school every day.
He has gone to school every day.
questions.correctAnswer: He goes to school every day.
questions.explanation: 'প্রতিদিন যায়' মানে ঘুরে ঘুরে হওয়া কাজ — Present Indefinite। তাই 'goes' (third person singular) সঠিক। Continuous হলে 'এখন যাচ্ছে' হতো।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমি প্রতিদিন ভাত খাই।'
options: I am eating rice every day.
questions.explanation: 'প্রতিদিন খাই' অভ্যাস — Present Indefinite। 'I' first person, তাই base verb 'eat' (কোনো s নেই)। Continuous হলে 'am eating' হতো।

questions.question: Translate: 'সূর্য পূর্ব দিকে ওঠে।'
options: The sun rises in the east.
The sun is rising in the east.
The sun rose in the east.
The sun has risen in the east.
questions.correctAnswer: The sun rises in the east.
questions.explanation: Universal truth (সার্বজনীন সত্য) Present Indefinite এ হয়। 'The sun' third person singular, তাই 'rises'। এটি একটি eternal fact।

questions.question: Translate: 'তারা ফুটবল খেলে।'
questions.explanation: 'খেলে' habitual action — Present Indefinite। 'They' plural subject, তাই base verb 'play' (কোনো s নেই)।

questions.question: Translate: 'পানি ১০০ ডিগ্রিতে ফোটে।'
questions.explanation: বৈজ্ঞানিক সত্য (scientific fact) Present Indefinite এ হয়। 'Water' third person singular, তাই 'boils'। Scientific facts সবসময় এই tense এ।

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence:
options: She goes to school every day.
She go to school every day.
She going to school every day.
She gone to school every day.
questions.correctAnswer: She goes to school every day.
questions.explanation: Quick rule: third person singular (she) + habitual 'every day' = Present Indefinite, 'go' → 'goes'। দ্রুত চিনতে শিখো — 'every day' দেখলে Present Indefinite ভাবো।

questions.question: Choose the correct form:
questions.explanation: Quick: 'He' third person singular → verb এ s বসে → 'plays'। দ্রুত সিদ্ধান্ত নাও — he/she/it দেখলে verb এ s//es।

questions.question: Pick the correct negative:
questions.explanation: Quick: third person singular negative = doesn't + base verb। 'She doesn't like'। 'don't' শুধু I/you/we/they এর সাথে।

questions.question: Pick the correct question form:
questions.explanation: Quick: third person singular প্রশ্ন = Does + subject + base verb। 'Does she sing?'। 'Does she sings' ভুল কারণ helper এ s থাকলে main verb এ s যায় না।

questions.question: Which is a universal truth?
options: The earth moves round the sun.
The earth is moving round the sun.
The earth moved round the sun.
The earth has moved round the sun.
questions.correctAnswer: The earth moves round the sun.
questions.explanation: Quick: universal truth সবসময় Present Indefinite এ হয়। 'The earth moves'। দ্রুত চিনো — eternal fact দেখলে Present Indefinite।

questions.question: Choose the correct verb: 'Birds ____ in the sky.'
questions.explanation: Quick: 'Birds' plural subject, তাই base verb 'fly'। দ্রুত নির্ণয় — plural হলে verb এ কিছু যায় না। (একটি পাখি হলে 'flies' হতো।)

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence (stative verb):
options: I am understanding the lesson now.
I was understanding the lesson now.
questions.explanation: Stative verb 'understand' Continuous তে বসে না, তাই Present Indefinite 'I understand' সঠিক। 'am understanding' ভুল। Mental state verbs (understand, know, believe) সাধারণত simple tense এ থাকে।

questions.question: The news ____ shocking every day.
questions.explanation: 'News' দেখতে plural মনে হলেও singular noun (uncountable), তাই 'is' বসে। এটি একটি tricky subject-verb agreement case। 'news', 'physics', 'mathematics', 'politics' সব singular।

questions.question: Mathematics ____ my favourite subject.
questions.explanation: 'Mathematics' -s দিয়ে শেষ হলেও singular noun (school subject), তাই 'is' বসে। Tricky case: subjects ending in -ics (mathematics, physics, politics) সাধারণত singular।

questions.question: The police ____ investigating the case.
questions.explanation: 'Police' দেখতে singular মনে হলেও plural collective noun, তাই 'are' বসে। Tricky case: police, people, cattle সবসময় plural verb নেয়। 'The police are' — এটাই সঠিক।

questions.question: Either of the boys ____ honest.
questions.explanation: 'Either of' / 'Neither of' সবসময় singular verb নেয়, যদিও পরে plural noun আসে। 'Either of the boys is' — singular verb। এটি একটি advanced agreement rule।

questions.question: Each of the students ____ a book.
questions.explanation: 'Each of' সবসময় singular হিসেবে ধরা হয়, তাই singular verb 'has' বসে। 'Each of the students has'। যদিও 'students' plural, 'each' singular force করে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'He don't knows the answer.'
questions.explanation: দুটি ভুল ছিল: (1) 'don't' → 'doesn't' (third person singular), (2) 'knows' → 'know'। Helper এ s থাকলে main verb থেকে s চলে যায়। 'doesn't know' সঠিক।

questions.question: Find the error: 'The water boil at 100 degrees.'
questions.explanation: দুটি বিষয়: scientific fact Present Indefinite এ হয়, এবং 'water' সাধারণত article ছাড়া বসে (generic)। 'Water boils' — singular verb কারণ water uncountable singular।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'She always brushes her teeth before bed.'
questions.explanation: 'always' frequency adverb + habitual action 'brushes' (third person singular) — Present Indefinite। Frequency adverbs (always, usually, often, sometimes) Present Indefinite এর চিহ্ন।

questions.question: Arrange: (always / he / on / time / arrives)
questions.explanation: Frequency adverb 'always' subject (He) এর পরে এবং main verb (arrives) এর আগে বসে। 'He always arrives'। এটি frequency adverb এর সঠিক position।

questions.question: Translate: 'সে সবসময় সত্য কথা বলে।'
options: He is always speaking the truth.
questions.explanation: 'সবসময় বলে' habitual action + frequency — Present Indefinite। 'He' third person singular, তাই 'speaks'। 'always' subject এর পরে, verb এর আগে।

questions.question: Translate: 'প্রত্যেকটি ছেলে সৎ বলে।'
options: Each of the boys is honest.
Each of the boys are honest.
questions.correctAnswer: Each of the boys is honest.
questions.explanation: 'প্রত্যেকটি' = 'Each of' যা singular verb নেয় → 'is'। 'Each of the boys is'। যদিও 'boys' plural, 'each' singular force করে।

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence (stative verb test):
questions.explanation: Stative verb 'taste' (sense perception) Continuous তে বসে না, তাই 'tastes' (Present Indefinite) সঠিক। Sense verbs (taste, smell, sound, feel) সাধারণত simple tense এ।

questions.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
options: The committee has reached a decision.
The committee have reached a decision.
The committee are reached a decision.
questions.correctAnswer: The committee has reached a decision.
questions.explanation: 'Committee' collective noun — একক অঙ্গ হিসেবে কাজ করলে singular verb 'has'। 'Committee has' সঠিক। (British English এ মাঝে মাঝে 'have' ও ব্যবহৃত হয় কিন্তু formal হলে 'has'।)

questions.question: One of my friends ____ in London.
questions.explanation: 'One of my friends' — subject হলো 'One' (singular), 'friends' নয়। তাই singular verb 'lives' বসে। Tricky: 'One of + plural noun + singular verb'।

questions.question: Find the error: 'One of my friend live in Dhaka.'
options: One of my friends lives in Dhaka.
One of my friend lives in Dhaka.
One of my friends live in Dhaka.
One of my friend living in Dhaka.
questions.correctAnswer: One of my friends lives in Dhaka.
questions.explanation: দুটি ভুল: (1) 'friend' → 'friends' ('One of' এর পরে plural noun বসে), (2) 'live' → 'lives' (subject 'One' singular, তাই singular verb)। 'One of my friends lives' সঠিক।
